examples: A story in Ovid will give you the necessary hints.
Ovid describes only four ages, omitting the age of Heroes.
The greater the man, the more restrained his anger. ——Ovid.
See that the Latin word clavus is associated with the god Janus by the writer Ovid.
The ancient Roman poet Ovid is best known for his poem, Metamorphoses, which trumpets change and transformation.
